cases.prompt: Set up spec-driven development in this repo so the agent writes a spec before coding.
I want a constitution plus per-feature spec/plan/tasks with acceptance-criteria traceability.
We have an old spec-registry.json from this harness lying around — help us migrate off it.
Give me a structural score for our SDD harness across constitution, planning, and verification.
Which Claude model should I use for summarization?
Just give me a simple feature list and an init script, no specs.
A freshly scaffolded harness should have no separate state file — each feature's phase lives in its own markdown.
cases.expect: create-sdd-harness.mjs writes no spec-registry.json; spec.md/plan.md/tasks.md each carry a **Phase:** line

cases.prompt: An older project still calls check-traceability.mjs from init.sh against a spec-registry.json it has on disk. Running it must not break init.sh.
cases.expect: check-traceability.mjs and validate-sdd-harness.mjs always exit 0 and print a deprecation notice, regardless of spec-registry.json content
